title: fix(deps): update module github.com/vishvananda/netlink to v1.3.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/vishvananda/netlink](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink) | `v1.3.1-0.20250425193846-9d88d8385bf9` -> `v1.3.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fvishvananda%2fnetlink/v1.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fvishvananda%2fnetlink/v1.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fvishvananda%2fnetlink/v1.3.1-0.20250425193846-9d88d8385bf9/v1.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fvishvananda%2fnetlink/v1.3.1-0.20250425193846-9d88d8385bf9/v1.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>vishvananda/netlink (github.com/vishvananda/netlink)</summary>

### [`v1.3.1`](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/releases/tag/v1.3.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1)

#### What's Changed

-   Fix deprecated comments by [@​champtar](https://redirect.github.com/champtar) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1011](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1011)
-   Fix: Do not crash when enumerating tc filters with unknown actionType by [@​Matus-p](https://redirect.github.com/Matus-p) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1013](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1013)
-   Fix SetSendTimeout/SetReceiveTimeout by [@​robmry](https://redirect.github.com/robmry) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1012](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1012)
-   capture and return errors in ConntrackDeleteFilters by [@​aroradaman](https://redirect.github.com/aroradaman) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1014](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1014)
-   Fix FouList attribute body truncated error with kernel 5.2+ by [@​chanfung032](https://redirect.github.com/chanfung032) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1017](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1017)
-   Preserve results when NLM_F_DUMP_INTR is set by [@​robmry](https://redirect.github.com/robmry) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1018](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1018)
-   netkit: Add support for IFLA_NETKIT_SCRUB and IFLA_NETKIT_PEER_SCRUB by [@​jrife](https://redirect.github.com/jrife) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1022](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1022)
-   fix CI failed Incidental in TestRuleListFiltered by [@​wangling94](https://redirect.github.com/wangling94) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1043](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1043)
-   disable broadcast if broadcast is set to net.IPv4zero by [@​WeidiDeng](https://redirect.github.com/WeidiDeng) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1037](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1037)
-   .github/workflows: Bump CI Go version to v1.22 by [@​dylandreimerink](https://redirect.github.com/dylandreimerink) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1049](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1049)
-   TC FLOWER enrich match field and action about vlan by [@​wangling94](https://redirect.github.com/wangling94) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1045](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1045)
-   link_linux: Add deserialization of `IFF_RUNNING` flag by [@​dylandreimerink](https://redirect.github.com/dylandreimerink) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1038](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1038)
-   Preserve results when NLM_F_DUMP_INTR is set by [@​adrianmoisey](https://redirect.github.com/adrianmoisey) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1050](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1050)
-   Add IFLA_PARENT_DEV_NAME / IFLA_PARENT_DEV_BUS_NAME to links by [@​akerouanton](https://redirect.github.com/akerouanton) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1051](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1051)
-   conntrack: prevent potential memory leak by [@​aroradaman](https://redirect.github.com/aroradaman) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1058](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1058)
-   Fix parsing 4-bytes attribute by [@​Asphaltt](https://redirect.github.com/Asphaltt) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1034](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1034)
-   fix: Use correct offset for unix socket diagnosis by [@​srebhan](https://redirect.github.com/srebhan) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1061](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1061)
-   vxlan: Fix parseVxlanData for source port range by [@​borkmann](https://redirect.github.com/borkmann) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1062](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1062)
-   netkit: Allow setting MAC address in L2 mode by [@​jrife](https://redirect.github.com/jrife) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1063](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1063)
-   Add support for MTU Lock by [@​trozet](https://redirect.github.com/trozet) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1067](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1067)
-   pedit: Fix EncodeActions to add TcGen for pedit action by [@​chent1996](https://redirect.github.com/chent1996) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1065](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1065)
-   go.mod: github.com/vishvananda/netns v0.0.5 by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1056](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1056)
-   Add `OifIndex` option for `RouteGetWithOptions` by [@​dylandreimerink](https://redirect.github.com/dylandreimerink) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1060](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1060)
-   Support TC "sample" filter action by [@​lorenz](https://redirect.github.com/lorenz) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1042](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1042)
-   Add support for XFRMA_SA_DIR and XFRMA_SA_PCPU attributes for XFRM by [@​ChinmayaSharma-hue](https://redirect.github.com/ChinmayaSharma-hue) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1044](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1044)
-   Add support for ARP/ND Timestamps when retriving neighbors by [@​jlamanna](https://redirect.github.com/jlamanna) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1039](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1039)

-   qdisc: fix wrong type info of tc_sfq_qopt by [@​lwintermelon](https://redirect.github.com/lwintermelon) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1083](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1083)
-   Mimic `ipset` C code for determining correct default ipset revision for `hash:ip{port,net,etc}` by [@​bleggett](https://redirect.github.com/bleggett) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1031](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1031)
-   bugfix: parse ipv4 src/dst error by [@​Charlie17Li](https://redirect.github.com/Charlie17Li) in [https://github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1015](https://redirect.github.com/vishvananda/netlink/pull/1015)
